nasb.text: In the place where they slay the burnt offering they are to slay the guilt offering, and he shall sprinkle its blood around on the altar.

esv.text: In the place where they kill the burnt offering they shall kill the guilt offering, and its blood shall be thrown against the sides of the altar.

cnv.text: 人在甚麼地方宰殺燔祭牲，就要在那裡宰殺贖愆祭牲，牠的血要潑在祭壇的四周。

ccb.text: 要在杀燔祭牲的地方宰赎过祭祭牲，祭牲的血要洒在祭坛周围。
